summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Finance Center improvements (Iteration 14). All 8 test cases passed. Backend API tests: 8/8 passed. Frontend UI tests: All critical flows working correctly.
passed_tests: Test 2: Member simulation shows simulated member's Total Deposits ($100.00) - NOT admin's value ✓
Test 3: Team Analytics includes admin account values - Team Account Value shows $14.6K (admin $14,521 + test user $100) ✓
Test 4: Analytics page has 'All Members' dropdown with member options ✓
Test 4b: Clicking member in dropdown opens stats dialog with Account Value, LOT Size, Total Profit, Total Deposits ✓
Test 5: Analytics page has date pickers (From/To) with Apply button ✓
Test 6: Date filtering works - Apply button triggers filter, Clear button appears ✓
Test 7: Archive Old Trades button exists and is functional ✓
Test 8: Member stats dialog shows Account Value ($100.00), LOT Size (0.10), Total Profit ($0.00), Total Deposits ($100.00) ✓
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext correctly implements getSimulatedTotalDeposits() and getSimulatedTotalProfit() functions
ProfitTrackerPage correctly uses effectiveTotalDeposits and effectiveTotalProfit for simulation mode
Backend /admin/analytics/team endpoint correctly includes all user roles (members + admins) in team stats
Backend /admin/analytics/member/{user_id} endpoint returns complete member stats including total_deposits
Backend /admin/analytics/growth-data endpoint supports optional start_date and end_date parameters
Frontend AdminAnalyticsPage correctly implements member dropdown, date pickers, and member stats dialog
seed_data_creation: Used existing test_user with $100 account value for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All four improvements from iteration 14 are fully implemented and tested: 1) Member simulation now correctly shows simulated member's Total Deposits (not admin's) - verified on Profit Tracker page showing $100 for test user, 2) Team Analytics includes admin accounts - Team Account Value shows ~$14.6K which includes admin's $14,521, 3) Analytics page has member dropdown that opens detailed stats dialog with Account Value, LOT Size, Total Profit, Total Deposits, 4) Performance Overview has date range pickers (From/To) with Apply button that filters chart data. Archive Old Trades button also works correctly.

member_simulation_total_deposits.description: Simulation correctly shows simulated member's Total Deposits ($100.00) instead of admin's value
member_simulation_total_deposits.verified_on: Profit Tracker page during simulation mode

team_analytics_includes_admins.description: Team Account Value shows $14.6K which includes admin ($14,521) + test user ($100)

member_dropdown_and_dialog.description: Dropdown shows 'All Members', 'TEST_Updated_b2f926', 'Ryan Salvador'. Clicking member opens stats dialog

date_range_picker.description: From/To date pickers with Apply button. Clear button appears after filter applied

archive_old_trades.description: Button exists and triggers archive action with toast notification
